caption: The video features a man performing in front of an audience, likely in a classroom or small auditorium setting. He is wearing a white shirt with a black vest adorned with intricate designs and embroidery, including a red and black motif on his chest. The man has long hair tied back and is wearing glasses. He is holding a microphone close to his mouth, suggesting he is singing or speaking. In front of him, there is a guitar resting against a stand, indicating that he may be playing music as part of his performance. The audience, visible in the foreground, appears to be composed of children, some of whom have their backs turned to the camera. The background consists of wooden blinds, adding to the indoor ambiance of the scene. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner, possibly indicating the name of the organization or event.
